---
title: "DEGoverlap"
params:                              
  experiment_id: S3_S4_COMP
  author: "Shalise Burch"
  date: "2026-02-17"
output: html_document  
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    echo: TRUE        
    warning: FALSE     
    message: FALSE   
---

T21 RA vs D21 RA 
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# UPDATED: 
# 2026-02-18 15:47 SAB ------------------------------

library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

exp_name <- params$experiment_id
data_path <- here("rnaseq", "01_data")
results_path <- here("rnaseq", "02_results")
rdata_path <- here("rnaseq", "03_rdata")

source(here(exp_name, "functions.R"))

head_dir <- file.path(results_path, "DEG Overlap Analysis")
make_subdir(head_dir)

out_dir <- file.path(head_dir, "SET3vSET4")
make_subdir(out_dir)


```

```{r}
SAB01_all <- readRDS("/Users/shalise/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-TheUniversityofChicago/R_Studio/SAB01/rnaseq/03_rdata/SAB01_DEG_unfiltered_ALL.rds")
SAB08_all <- readRDS("/Users/shalise/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-TheUniversityofChicago/R_Studio/SAB08/rnaseq/03_rdata/SAB08_DEG_unfiltered_ALL.rds")

```

```{r}
# Find the inner element for a given day 
get_day_df <- function(DEG_all, contrast, day) {
  stopifnot(contrast %in% names(DEG_all))
  
  inner <- DEG_all[[contrast]]
  inner_names <- names(inner)
  if (is.null(inner_names)) stop("Inner list has no names; can't find day keys.")
  
  # robust match: any key that contains "D4" as a token (handles "D4", "day_D4", "D4_something")
  hits <- inner_names[str_detect(inner_names, regex(paste0("\\b", day, "\\b"), ignore_case = TRUE))]
  
  # fallback: if day isn't a clean token, match just "D4" anywhere
  if (length(hits) == 0) {
    hits <- inner_names[str_detect(inner_names, fixed(day, ignore_case = TRUE))]
  }
  
  if (length(hits) == 0) {
    stop(paste0("No inner key matched day=", day, " for contrast=", contrast,
                ". Available keys: ", paste(inner_names, collapse = ", ")))
  }
  
  # If multiple matches (rare), choose first but warn
  if (length(hits) > 1) {
    warning(paste0("Multiple keys matched ", day, " for ", contrast, ": ",
                   paste(hits, collapse = ", "), ". Using: ", hits[1]))
  }
  
  as.data.frame(inner[[hits[1]]])
}

#filter DEGS
filter_deg_genes <- function(df,
                             padj_cut = 0.05,
                             lfc_cut = 0.5,
                             lfc_col = "log2FoldChange_raw",
                             gene_col_candidates = c("gene_id","gene","symbol")) {
  
  if (!("padj" %in% names(df))) stop("No 'padj' column found.")
  if (!(lfc_col %in% names(df))) stop(paste0("No '", lfc_col, "' column found."))

  gene_col <- gene_col_candidates[gene_col_candidates %in% names(df)][1]
  if (is.na(gene_col)) stop("No gene column found (expected gene_id/gene/symbol).")

  df_f <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(padj), padj < padj_cut) %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[lfc_col]]), abs(.data[[lfc_col]]) > lfc_cut)

  genes_all <- unique(df_f[[gene_col]])
  genes_up  <- unique(df_f[[gene_col]][df_f[[lfc_col]] > 0])
  genes_dn  <- unique(df_f[[gene_col]][df_f[[lfc_col]] < 0])

  list(df = df_f, all = genes_all, up = genes_up, down = genes_dn, gene_col = gene_col)
}
```

contrasts
```{r}
ctA <- "T21_RA_vs_D21_RA"
ctB <- "D21_RA_vs_D21_CTRL"

lfc_col <- "log2FoldChange_raw"   # change to raw if needed
padj_cut <- 0.05
lfc_cut  <- 0.5
day_use  <- "D4"

# SAB01 SET3
sab01_A_df <- get_day_df(SAB01_all, ctA, day_use)
sab01_B_df <- get_day_df(SAB01_all, ctB, day_use)

sab01_A <- filter_deg_genes(sab01_A_df, padj_cut, lfc_cut, lfc_col)
sab01_B <- filter_deg_genes(sab01_B_df, padj_cut, lfc_cut, lfc_col)

# SAB08 SET4
sab08_A_df <- get_day_df(SAB08_all, ctA, day_use)
sab08_B_df <- get_day_df(SAB08_all, ctB, day_use)

sab08_A <- filter_deg_genes(sab08_A_df, padj_cut, lfc_cut, lfc_col)
sab08_B <- filter_deg_genes(sab08_B_df, padj_cut, lfc_cut, lfc_col)
```

```{r}
overlap_sets <- function(x, y) {
  list(
    shared = intersect(x, y),
    SAB01_only = setdiff(x, y),
    SAB08_only = setdiff(y, x)
  )
}


A_all  <- overlap_sets(sab01_A$all,  sab08_A$all)
A_up   <- overlap_sets(sab01_A$up,   sab08_A$up)
A_down <- overlap_sets(sab01_A$down, sab08_A$down)

B_all  <- overlap_sets(sab01_B$all,  sab08_B$all)
B_up   <- overlap_sets(sab01_B$up,   sab08_B$up)
B_down <- overlap_sets(sab01_B$down, sab08_B$down)

#identify  inconsistency genes
consistent_genes_A <- c(A_up$shared, A_down$shared)
inconsistent_genes_A <- setdiff(A_all$shared, consistent_genes_A)

consistent_genes_B <- c(B_up$shared, B_down$shared)
inconsistent_genes_B <- setdiff(B_all$shared, consistent_genes_B)


#summary table
summary_table <- tibble::tibble(
  contrast = c(ctA, ctB),
  
  SAB01_all = c(length(sab01_A$all), length(sab01_B$all)),
  SAB08_all = c(length(sab08_A$all), length(sab08_B$all)),
  shared_all = c(length(A_all$shared), length(B_all$shared)),
  
  shared_up = c(length(A_up$shared), length(B_up$shared)),
  shared_down = c(length(A_down$shared), length(B_down$shared))
)

print(summary_table)
```

```{r}
shared_genotype_under_RA <- c(A_up$shared, A_down$shared)  
shared_canonical_RA      <- c(B_up$shared, B_down$shared)  

shared_both <- intersect(shared_genotype_under_RA, shared_canonical_RA)

cat("Shared (T21_RA vs D21_RA) at D4:", length(shared_genotype_under_RA), "\n")
cat("Shared (D21_RA vs D21_CTRL) at D4:", length(shared_canonical_RA), "\n")
cat("Overlap between those shared cores:", length(shared_both), "\n")

out <- list(
  day = day_use,
  lfc_col = lfc_col,
  filters = list(padj_cut = padj_cut, lfc_cut = lfc_cut),

  A_T21RA_vs_D21RA = list(  all = A_all, up = A_up, down = A_down, consistent = consistent_genes_A, inconsistent = inconsistent_genes_A),
  B_D21RA_vs_CTRL  = list(all = B_all, up = B_up, down = B_down, consistent = consistent_genes_B, inconsistent = inconsistent_genes_B),

  shared_both = shared_both
)

file_name <- paste0("D4_overlap_SAB01_SAB08_", Sys.Date(), ".rds")

saveRDS(out, file = file.path(out_dir, file_name))
```

save excel
```{r}
library(writexl)

# Prepare Excel sheets
excel_list <- list(
  Summary = summary_table,
  
  A_shared_all = data.frame(gene = A_all$shared),
  A_shared_up = data.frame(gene = A_up$shared),
  A_shared_down = data.frame(gene = A_down$shared),
  A_consistent = data.frame(gene = consistent_genes_A),
  A_inconsistent = data.frame(gene = inconsistent_genes_A),
  
  B_shared_all = data.frame(gene = B_all$shared),
  B_shared_up = data.frame(gene = B_up$shared),
  B_shared_down = data.frame(gene = B_down$shared),
  B_consistent = data.frame(gene = consistent_genes_B),
  B_inconsistent = data.frame(gene = inconsistent_genes_B),
  
  
  Shared_between_contrasts = data.frame(gene = shared_both)
)

excel_file <- file.path(out_dir,
                         paste0("D4_overlap_summary_SAB01_SAB08_", Sys.Date(), ".xlsx"))

write_xlsx(excel_list, excel_file)
```
PDF summary
```{r}
pdf_file <- file.path(out_dir,
                      paste0("D4_overlap_counts_SAB01_SAB08_", Sys.Date(), ".pdf"))

pdf(pdf_file, width = 8, height = 6)

plot.new()

text(0.1, 0.9, paste("D4 DEG Overlap Summary"), adj = 0, cex = 1.4)

text(0.1, 0.8, paste("Contrast A:", ctA), adj = 0)
text(0.1, 0.75, paste("SAB01 DEGs:", length(sab01_A$all)), adj = 0)
text(0.1, 0.7, paste("SAB08 DEGs:", length(sab08_A$all)), adj = 0)
text(0.1, 0.65, paste("Shared (all):", length(A_all$shared)), adj = 0)
text(0.1, 0.6, paste("Shared (up):", length(A_up$shared)), adj = 0)
text(0.1, 0.55, paste("Shared (down):", length(A_down$shared)), adj = 0)
text(0.1, 0.5, paste("Consistent direction:", length(consistent_genes_A)), adj = 0)
text(0.1, 0.45, paste("Inconsistent direction:", length(inconsistent_genes_A)), adj = 0)

text(0.1, 0.35, paste("Contrast B:", ctB), adj = 0)
text(0.1, 0.3, paste("SAB01 DEGs:", length(sab01_B$all)), adj = 0)
text(0.1, 0.25, paste("SAB08 DEGs:", length(sab08_B$all)), adj = 0)
text(0.1, 0.2, paste("Shared (all):", length(B_all$shared)), adj = 0)
text(0.1, 0.15, paste("Shared (up):", length(B_up$shared)), adj = 0)
text(0.1, 0.1, paste("Shared (down):", length(B_down$shared)), adj = 0)

dev.off()
```
